text:
The Laboratory in the News
A New Paradigm for Medical Research
Commentary by Patricia Falcone
High-Performance Computing Takes Aim at Cancer
Lawrence Livermore's supercomputers are playing a crucial role in advancing cancer research and treatment.
New Insight into an Intriguing Material
Combining experiment and computer simulation, scientists gain a new understanding of lithium hydride's elusive equation of state.
Peering into the Brain with Chemical Biosensors
Livermore-developed biosensors could advance medical research by opening a window into the brain's neurochemistry.
Rapid Recovery of Critical Infrastructure
Collaborative studies help identify necessary steps for quick restoration of an underground transportation system following a biological attack.
